title: Boere win "Slag van Spandaukop"
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The ‘Slag van Spandaukop’ between the Afrikaans and English golfers at the Graaff-Reinet Golf Club on Saturday, 8 March, was won by the Boere, 10 matches to six.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The ‘Slag van Spandaukop’ between the Afrikaans and English golfers at the Graaff-Reinet Golf Club on Saturday, 8 March, was won by the Boere, 10 matches to six."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The golf course was in great condition, and the balmy weather and rain-free skies resulted in a successful day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Great food, superb ambiance and good attendance on the deck kept the players celebrating.","html":"Great food, superb ambiance and good attendance on the deck kept the players celebrating."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks to Noorsveld Chickens and Pick n Pay Graaff-Reinet, the players received lots of delightful prizes.","html":"Thanks to Noorsveld Chickens and Pick n Pay Graaff-Reinet, the players received lots of delightful prizes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wayne Myburgh, who had the longest drive among the men on Saturday, and club captain Derek Helm.","html":"Wayne Myburgh, who had the longest drive among the men on Saturday, and club captain Derek Helm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
